sentences.english: There are four seasons in Korea — spring summer fall and winter.
sentences.korean: 한국에는 네 계절이 있어요 — 봄 여름 가을 겨울.

sentences.english: Spring is warm and the cherry blossoms are beautiful.
Summer is very hot and humid.
Fall has cool weather and colorful leaves.
sentences.korean: 가을은 시원한 날씨와 알록달록한 나뭇잎이 있어요.

sentences.english: Winter is cold and sometimes it snows.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
